nasb.text: The scepter shall not depart from Judah, Nor the ruler’s staff from between his feet, Until Shiloh comes, And to him shall be the obedience of the peoples.

esv.text: The scepter shall not depart from Judah, nor the ruler’s staff from between his feet, until tribute comes to him; and to him shall be the obedience of the peoples.

cnv.text: 權杖必不離開猶大， 王圭必不離他兩腳之間， 直到細羅來到， 萬族都要臣服他。

ccb.text: 王权必不离犹大， 御杖必伴他左右， 直到那位执掌王权的来到， 万民都必归顺他。

csbs.text: 权杖必不离开犹大， 王杖必不离他两脚之间， 直到“细罗”来到， 万民都要归顺他。
